title: Madhe Ghat
tagline: Madhe Ghat — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Madhe Ghat is a waterfall located in Maharashtra, a state of India, around 62 km southwest of Pune, bordering Raigad district and in the vicinity of Torna Fort, Rajgad, Raigad Fort
overview.description: Madhe Ghat is a waterfall located in Maharashtra, a state of India, around 62 km southwest of Pune, bordering Raigad district and in the vicinity of Torna Fort, Rajgad, Raigad Fort and the backwaters of the Bhatghar Dam. The name of the waterfall is Laxmi Waterfall. It is about 850 meters above sea level and situated in dense forests behind Torna Fort. The view from Madhe Ghat offers a panorama of a vast area, comprising, for example, Raigad Fort, Lingana, Varandha Ghat and Shivthar Ghal.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Shivthar Ghal
topPlaces.description: Shivthar Ghal, also known as Sundarmath, (Sundarmath means Beautiful Monastery), is a cave, about 34 km from Mahad, near Barasgaon, Maharashtra, India. Shivthar Ghal is located in Varandha Ghat in the Sahyadris on the Bhor-Mahad road.

topPlaces.name: Varandha Ghat
topPlaces.description: Varandha Ghat (Marathi: वरंधा घाट) is a mountain passage located between NH4 and Konkan in Maharashtra, India for road traffic. Situated on the crest of the Western Ghat mountain ranges, Varandha Ghat is noted for its surroundings, comprising scenic waterfalls, lakes and dense woods.

topPlaces.name: ISKCON Temple, Pune
topPlaces.description: ISKCON New Vedic Cultural Center (NVCC), Sri Sri Radha Vrindavanchandra temple or ISKCON Pune is a Gaudiya Vaishnavism temple situated in Pune, India. The temple is dedicated to Hindu god Radha Krishna and was opened in 2013.

items.note: Shivthar Ghal, also known as Sundarmath, (Sundarmath means Beautiful Monastery), is a cave, about 34 km from Mahad, near Barasgaon, Maharashtra, India. Shivthar Ghal is located in Varandha Ghat in the Sahyadris on the Bhor-Mahad road.

Varandha Ghat (Marathi: वरंधा घाट) is a mountain passage located between NH4 and Konkan in Maharashtra, India for road traffic. Situated on the crest of the Western Ghat mountain ranges, Varandha Ghat is noted for its surroundings, comprising scenic waterfalls, lakes and dense woods.

ISKCON New Vedic Cultural Center (NVCC), Sri Sri Radha Vrindavanchandra temple or ISKCON Pune is a Gaudiya Vaishnavism temple situated in Pune, India. The temple is dedicated to Hindu god Radha Krishna and was opened in 2013.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Madhe Ghat?
faq.a: The best time to visit Madhe Ghat is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Madhe Ghat?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Madhe Ghat?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Madhe Ghat at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Madhe Ghat?
faq.a: Stays in Madhe Ghat start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Madhe Ghat?
faq.a: The top attractions are Shivthar Ghal, Varandha Ghat, ISKCON Temple, Pune.
